title: Administrative Sanction. In case of unjustified failure by the LMAs,
content: 13 principals/employers, or seafarers to abide by the terms of the approved settlement, the 14 Department, upon motion of the aggrieved party or on its own initiative, shall issue a Writ 15 of Execution for the enforcement of the settlement agreement. 16 17 Failure of any party to comply with the terms of approved settlement despite the lapse of 18 thirty (30) calendar days from the issuance of the Writ, shall warrant the documentary 19 processing suspension or temporary disqualification from participating in the overseas 20 employment program of the non-complying party, as the case may be, until compliance 21 with or satisfaction of the approved settlement. Such suspension or temporary 22 disqualification order shall be issued by the Department. 23 24
